targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', t.ts) AS time, AVG(t.irms_a) AS value, d.name AS metric FROM telemetry t JOIN devices d ON t.device_id = d.id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.ts) GROUP BY time, d.name ORDER BY time
SELECT id, name, fw_version, last_seen, (now() - last_seen < interval '30 seconds') AS online FROM devices ORDER BY id

SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', t.ts) AS time, AVG(t.thd_pct) AS value, d.name AS metric FROM telemetry t JOIN devices d ON t.device_id = d.id WHERE t.source='ct' AND $__timeFilter(t.ts) GROUP BY time, d.name ORDER BY time
SELECT ts, device_id, kind, detail, zscore FROM events WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', t.ts) AS time, AVG(t.p_est_w) AS value, d.name || ' (' || t.source || ')' AS metric FROM telemetry t JOIN devices d ON t.device_id = d.id WHERE $__timeFilter(t.ts) GROUP BY time, d.name, t.source ORDER BY time

SELECT time_bucket('10 seconds', ts) AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN device_id = 'esp32s3-98a316f06f08' THEN irms_a END) AS "Household Phase (A)", AVG(CASE WHEN device_id = 'esp32s3-98a316f07e4c' THEN irms_a END) AS "HVAC Phase (A)", AVG(CASE WHEN device_id = 'esp32s3-98a316f06bb0' THEN irms_a END) AS "Neutral / Imbalance Current (measured)" FROM telemetry WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
